subcodes.first_line: O trusted one of the divine Threshold! Give thanks unto the intended Lord, the Beauty of the Adored One, and the Sovereign of the seen and unseen, that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امین درگاه الهی شکر کن حضرت مقصود و جمال معبود و سلطان غیب و شهود را که
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for protection, @power of prayer
